renderFooter.signature: renderFooter(nextCommand: string, options?: { clearRequired?: boolean }): string
renderFooter.description: Renders a standardized footer string with /clear reminder and suggested next command. Called by lifecycle skills at completion.

CLEAR_POLICY.description: Document defining which skill transitions require /clear reminders (lifecycle boundaries: yes, review sub-steps: no, help/status: no)

footerConsistency.description: All lifecycle skills (init, start-set, discuss-set, plan-set, execute-set, review, merge, new-version, add-set, scaffold, audit-version) must call renderFooter() at completion

noColorRespect.description: renderFooter() respects NO_COLOR environment variable, consistent with existing display.cjs behavior

definition.scope: Implement renderFooter() utility in display.cjs, define /clear policy, add structural test, apply footer to all lifecycle skills (~10-12 skills).

tasks.description: Implement renderFooter() in display.cjs with /clear guidance and next-command suggestion
tasks.acceptance: Function exported, handles NO_COLOR, renders consistently

tasks.description: Define /clear policy -- which skills get footers and which do not
Wire renderFooter() display CLI subcommand into rapid-tools.cjs
tasks.acceptance: Skills can invoke via node rapid-tools.cjs display footer

tasks.description: Apply footer to all lifecycle skills (~10-12)
tasks.acceptance: Each lifecycle skill calls footer display at completion

tasks.description: Add structural test verifying all lifecycle skills include footer call
tasks.acceptance: Test fails if a lifecycle skill omits footer

acceptance: renderFooter() utility exists in display.cjs and is callable from skills
All lifecycle skills produce /clear guidance at completion
